LanguageData.VCE_MealArtDescriptionRoot.rulePack.rule: r_art_description->A [decadent] [cut] of [preparation_method] [protein], [descriptor_importance]. [Carefully] [preparation_method] [delicate] [strands] of [vegetable1] add a [refined_contrast], while [delicate] [preparation_method] [vegetable2] [lends] [descriptor] and [descriptor] to the composition. A [whisper] of [condiment1], [descriptor_effects], intertwining with the [whisper] of [condiment2] for a truly [elevated] experience. [artistic_precision], each element is [goal_of_the_meal].
LanguageData.VCE_MealDescriptionUtility_Global.rulePa: preparation_method->flawlessly whipped into a velvety texture
preparation_method->shaped into a work of art
preparation_method->kissed by moonlight and slow-aged in crystal chambers
preparation_method->hand-massaged by expert chefs under symphonic vibrations
preparation_method->delicately smoked over uralt spell-infused woods
preparation_method->fermented under the watchful gaze of a Michelin-starred monk
preparation_method->bathed in a reduction of tears from a joyfully weeping sommelier
